title: Edge wiring and move-upstream-to-role transform
description:
Wire internal and anchor edges and run the move-upstream-to-role transform on the pre-apply snapshot.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] [hard] APPB-01: internal and anchor edges are wired; the result is acyclic and transitively reduced.
- [ ] [hard] APPB-02: the transform uses the pre-apply snapshot and never moves the freshly-created scaffold nodes.
